mapper.sql: id, product_name, product_code, category_id, category_name, brand, price, cost_price, stock, sales, unit, main_image, images, description, specs, sort, status, is_new, is_hot, is_recommend, create_time, update_time, deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM product WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM product WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product (product_name, product_code, category_id, category_name, brand, price, cost_price, stock, sales, unit, main_image, images, description, specs, sort, status, is_new, is_hot, is_recommend, create_time, update_time, deleted) VALUES (#{productName}, #{productCode}, #{categoryId}, #{categoryName}, #{brand}, #{price}, #{costPrice}, #{stock}, #{sales}, #{unit}, #{mainImage}, #{images}, #{description}, #{specs}, #{sort}, #{status}, #{isNew}, #{isHot}, #{isRecommend}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{deleted})
mapper.update: UPDATE product SET deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE product SET deleted = 1 WHERE id IN #{id}
UPDATE product SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE product SET stock = #{stock} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE product SET sales = sales + #{count} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM product WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 1 ORDER BY sales DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM product WHERE deleted = 0
